# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Architecture or decision
- [ ] Application code
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Design
- [ ] Medical education content or workflow

## Related Issue Or Decision

Link the issue, task, or ADR.

## Testing

Describe checks performed. If not applicable, explain why.

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Decision recorded or updated
- [ ] Changelog updated if needed
- [ ] Not applicable

## Risk Review

- [ ] Accessibility impact considered
- [ ] Security/privacy impact considered
- [ ] Performance impact considered
- [ ] Medical education impact considered
- [ ] No meaningful risk

## Review Focus

Tell reviewers what deserves the closest attention.
